sections.text: This is a generated static snapshot from the local repo. It does not make live status calls.

panels.title: Runtime
paragraphs: Python remains the active reference/oracle lane. The Rust parity lane exists, but Rust is not the active runtime.

panels.title: Public Alpha
paragraphs: Public Alpha Safe Mode exists and blocks caller-provided local path controls in constrained demo routes. Public Alpha Rehearsal Evidence v0 records local static-site, smoke, route, eval, and baseline-status evidence. LIVE_ALPHA_01 adds a public-alpha wrapper with localhost defaults, closed live-probe gates, and config checks. Public alpha is not production and is not open live hosting approval.

panels.title: Archive Evals
paragraphs: The Archive Resolution Eval Runner currently reports 6 hard tasks internally satisfied against the fixture-backed local corpus. Internal satisfaction is regression evidence, not a production relevance benchmark.

panels.title: Search Usefulness
paragraphs: The current local audit reports 64 queries: 5 covered, 22 partial, 26 source gaps, 9 capability gaps, and 2 unknown. Source and capability gaps remain expected.

panels.title: External Baselines
paragraphs: Google Web Search, Internet Archive metadata search, and Internet Archive full-text/OCR search remain external baselines pending/manual. Batch 0 has 39 pending slots and 0 observed records.

panels.title: Static Public Data
paragraphs: Generated Public Data Summaries v0 publishes deterministic JSON summaries under data/. Lite/Text/Files Seed Surfaces v0 consumes those summaries for no-JS/no-download compatibility surfaces, Static Resolver Demo Snapshots v0 adds fixture-backed static demo examples under demo/, Custom Domain / Alternate Host Readiness v0 adds static-host portability contracts without configuring DNS, CNAME, or an alternate host, Live Backend Handoff Contract v0 reserves /api/v1 as future contract-only handoff routes, and Live Probe Gateway Contract v0 defines disabled-by-default source probe policy without implementing probes.

panels.title: Deferred Surfaces
paragraphs: Native apps are deferred. Backend deployment infrastructure is absent; /api/v1 is not live, no custom domain is configured, Google remains manual-baseline only, and no live source probes, Internet Archive live calls, source crawling, auth, accounts, rate limiting, TLS ownership, or production process supervision are implemented here.
